title: Epoxy Glue / Super Glue, Quick Setting
description: Epoxy Glue Epoxy Glue is the world's fastest, toughest mender. It has tremendous strength and durability. Just mix and apply. Makes extremely strong bonds. Works great for filling gasps and holes as it hardens to a rigid, metallic mass. Makes durable, lasting reoairs to lawn mowers, machinery, appliances, tols and vehicles. Bonds any metal to itself or to another metal. Also fastens wood, glass, ceramic and concrete to themselves or each other. Chemical resistant. Dries to a clear finish. Not recommended for flexible materials or polyethylene. Will not conduct electricity. Non-shrinking. Sets in 3 - 5 minutes.
